title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: We are looking for an ML Engineer to build and deploy ML models. Strong knowledge of Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, and Scikit-learn required. Experience with AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes is a plus. Must have experience in NLP and computer vision.

title: Data Scientist
description: Seeking a Data Scientist with strong analytical skills. Proficiency in Python, R, SQL required. Experience with Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, and Power BI preferred. Must be familiar with statistical modeling and A/B testing.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Full Stack Developer with React, Node.js, and MongoDB skills. Experience with Docker, Git, REST APIs required. AWS deployment experience is a plus.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Looking for DevOps Engineer with strong cloud skills. Must know AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, Jenkins. Experience with CI/CD pipelines and monitoring tools required.

title: Backend Python Developer
description: Backend Python Developer for Django/FastAPI applications. Must know PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker. Experience with REST APIs, Celery, and AWS deployment preferred.
